head.title: Pricing | Blacks Solicitors LLP
head.description: Explore our transparent legal pricing and fees. Find clear, competitive costs for individuals and businesses with no hidden surprises.
head.ogDescription: Explore our transparent legal pricing and fees. Find clear, competitive costs for individuals and businesses with no hidden surprises.

blocks.html:
Payment & pricing

We keep our pricing clear, fair, and easy to understand.
You'll find important information about payment methods, reference numbers,
and processing times below the online payment button.

Make a payment online

Access our secure online payments portal to make a payment today. We will never ask you to make a payment via a link sent from an unofficial source.

Make a payment

Call our Accounts team

Make an online payment

To make an online payment, you'll need your unique reference number. You can find this on your latest invoice or in previous correspondence from us.

‍

Please note that all payments must be made in GBP Sterling and can take up to four working days to clear into our account.

‍

Internet or telephone banking

If you're making a payment by bank transfer, please note that transfers are made at the sender's own risk.

To help protect against fraud and reduce the risk of funds being sent to the wrong account, please call our Accounts Team on 0113 207 0000 to check our bank details before making a transfer.

‍

We cannot accept responsibility for any loss or damage arising from cybercrime or payments sent to an incorrect account.

‍

Please include your reference number when making a payment so we can allocate it promptly. To make sure your payment reaches us on time, please send it at least five working days before the due date.

‍

Accepted payments

  • Search Fees
  • Payment of your bill
  • Payment on account of our future costs and disbursements

Unaccepted payments

  • Deposits for a property purchase (or conveyancing transaction)
  • Balance required to complete a property purchase (or conveyancing transaction)

Clear and transparent legal fees

When you work with us, we take the time to understand what you need and the sector you’re in. That means we can give you advice that’s practical, relevant, and built around you.

‍

We focus on delivering a high standard of service and real client care. Strong relationships matter to us, and we build them by being open, consistent, and easy to work with.

‍

You’ll always know where you stand on costs. We’re open about how we charge, so there are no surprises and you can make confident, informed decisions.

‍

Depending on the work you need, we’ll agree a pricing structure that suits you. This could include:

‍

• Hourly rates

• Fixed fees

• Per transaction pricing

• Or a tailored approach based on your circumstances

‍

We’ll explain everything clearly from the start, so you understand exactly what you’re paying for.

‍

Published pricing information

For some services, our regulators require us to publish pricing details. This may include average costs or price ranges to give you a helpful guide.

‍

You can find more detailed pricing information for those services on the relevant pages linked below.

‍

Conveyancing pricing

• Freehold sale costs

• Leasehold sale costs

• Freehold purchase costs

• Leasehold purchase costs

• Freehold re-mortgage costs

• Leasehold re-mortgage costs

‍

Private Wealth & Succession pricing

• Probate costs

‍

Employment pricing

• Unfair/constructive dismissal costs

‍

Debt Recovery pricing

• Debt recovery costs

‍

We’re always happy to talk things through in more detail.

‍

If you’ve got any questions about our fees, the services we offer, or how payment works, just get in touch. You can call us on 0113 207 0000 and we’ll help you find the right approach for you.

Stay informed.
Stay empowered.

Get practical advice, legal insights and firm updates, curated for you.

By clicking Sign Up you're confirming that you agree with our Terms and Conditions.
